title: Spire Network
description: A creator-focused platform for user-generated worlds and games, built on vanilla Minecraft with no client-side mods required.
note: Current flagship project. Public release is not confirmed.

title: DBS-Breakthrough
description:
< SHATTER THE LIMIT >

Fight it out as your favorite characters in DBS-Breakthrough, a Dragon Ball Super inspired fighting game built for explosive VR battles and a large playable roster.
note: Rec Room is shutting down in June 2026. This room will become inaccessible after shutdown, so this page preserves a static snapshot only.

title: Breakthrough Open Beta
description: An archived beta build created during the early development of DBS-Breakthrough. It remains here as a record of the project’s earlier public milestone.
note: Rec Room is shutting down in June 2026. This archived room will no longer be accessible once the platform closes.
